corrections.text: Provenance note: automated source snapshots for both cited URLs failed at review time (github.blog returned a fetch error and windowsforum.com returned HTTP 403 bot-block), so no local HTML snapshot is archived for this article. Every claim and direct quote was instead verified against the live sources; the URLs are valid, not dead links.

Sourcing note: the secondary source windowsforum.com is not on the newsroom's source allowlist. It is used only for corroboration (the June 26, 2026 release date, BYOK support, and the caution that an AI-suggested merge can still be wrong). All primary facts and every direct quote derive from GitHub's own changelog on github.blog.
